name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL_CORE
description: Core vertical picker component managing 3 visible items with smooth scroll transitions. Calculates CENTER_OFFSET for alignment, applies transform for scrolling. Wrapped by VerticalList2ndDepth for full screen integration.
visualForm: Three vertically stacked items (68px each) with smooth translateY scrolling, center item selection
descriptionKo: 3개 항목을 부드러운 스크롤로 관리하는 핵심 세로 피커 컴포넌트입니다. 정렬용 CENTER_OFFSET을 계산하고 translateY로 스크롤을 구현합니다. VerticalList2ndDepth에 래핑되어 사용됩니다.
descriptionEn: Core vertical picker component managing 3 visible items with smooth scroll transitions. Calculates CENTER_OFFSET for alignment, applies transform for scrolling. Wrapped by VerticalList2ndDepth for full screen integration.
